blood_slash.name: Blood Slash
blood_slash.description: Setup/Builder: A brutal radial slash. Deals martial damage and generates 15 Blood Well. No cooldown.

rend_soul.name: Rend Soul
rend_soul.description: Setup: Tear at the target's life force. Applies [Bleeding] for 6 ticks and [Reduced Defense] for 4 ticks.

reaving_strike.name: Reaving Strike
reaving_strike.description: Payoff: Strike with absolute malice. Deals 3x damage to [Bleeding] targets. If it kills, you instantly restore 25% of your max HP.

crimson_nova.name: Crimson Nova
crimson_nova.description: Payoff/AOE: Detonate your own vitality. Consumes all Blood Well to deal massive Dark damage in a radius. Damage scales 5% per point of Blood Well consumed.

blood_armor.name: Blood Armor
blood_armor.description: Defense/Shield: Harden your blood into a jagged cage. Consumes 50 Blood Well to grant an Absorption Shield equal to 150% of your Strength.

vampiric_pact.name: Vampiric Pact
vampiric_pact.description: Defense/Restoration: Infuse your weapon with hunger. For 5 ticks, your physical strikes restore HP equal to 20% of the damage dealt.

blood_dash.name: Blood Dash
blood_dash.description: Mobility: Burst forward in a spray of blood. Instantly travel up to 2 rooms. Deals minor damage to all in departure room.

blood_boil.name: Blood Boil
blood_boil.description: Utility/Buff: Agitate your blood to its limit. Increases Attack Speed by 25% and Dark Scaling by 15% for 8 ticks, but you take minor damage each tick.

soul_reaver_physiology.name: Soul Reaver Physiology
soul_reaver_physiology.description: Passive: You are a predator of blood. Dealing damage with [martial] tags has a 15% chance to double your Blood Well generation on that strike.
